specific_question: Which Elexion Automotive North American offices had the highest employee participation in internal EV sales strategy workshops in Q1 2026?
answer: According to Elexion's internal HR reports, the New York and Los Angeles offices had the highest participation in internal EV sales strategy workshops during Q1 2026, with 87% and 82% of employees, respectively, attending.
